# HELP nv_inference_request_success Number of successful inference requests
# TYPE nv_inference_request_success counter
nv_inference_request_success{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 45231
# HELP nv_inference_request_failure Number of failed inference requests
# TYPE nv_inference_request_failure counter
nv_inference_request_failure{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 12
# HELP nv_inference_pending_request_count Pending request count
# TYPE nv_inference_pending_request_count gauge
nv_inference_pending_request_count{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 5
# HELP nv_inference_request_duration_us Inference request duration in microseconds
# TYPE nv_inference_request_duration_us histogram
nv_inference_request_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="1000"} 100
nv_inference_request_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="5000"} 400
nv_inference_request_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="10000"} 800
nv_inference_request_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="+Inf"} 1000
nv_inference_request_duration_us_sum{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 6500000
nv_inference_request_duration_us_count{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 1000
# HELP nv_inference_queue_duration_us Queue duration in microseconds
# TYPE nv_inference_queue_duration_us histogram
nv_inference_queue_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="100"} 200
nv_inference_queue_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="500"} 700
nv_inference_queue_duration_us_bucket{model="llama2_7b",version="1",le="+Inf"} 1000
nv_inference_queue_duration_us_sum{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 250000
nv_inference_queue_duration_us_count{model="llama2_7b",version="1"} 1000
